ratings.comment: Megan clearly really cares about the subject and her students. While the class can have some dense readings, there is lots of group discussion which is helpful for interpretation. The class has a very large attendance/participation grade (nearing 40%) so prepare to attend every class.

May be the best professor at UW-Madison. took LIS 350 - History and future of books this semester (fall 2023) and it sounded like the driest class ever but Megan made it so interactive and fun. Her style of teaching is unique and very engaging. Gives amazing feedback and always willing to help students!
